# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Change Type

- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major

## LOS Review

- [ ] Aligns with the Constitution or is preparing Sprint 1 Constitution work
- [ ] Strengthens trust or does not weaken trust
- [ ] Is scalable
- [ ] Is documentable
- [ ] Can eventually be automated, where relevant
- [ ] Creates or preserves durable competitive advantage

## Decision Records

- [ ] No decision record needed
- [ ] Decision Log added or updated
- [ ] RFC added or updated
- [ ] ADR added or updated

## Metadata

- [ ] New or changed LOS pages include required metadata
- [ ] Related chapters and dependencies are updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md is updated when needed
